name: MyCar Care KH
description:
AI-powered vehicle maintenance, diagnostics, and service platform for Cambodia. View vehicle profiles, generate weakness reports, track maintenance schedules, check symptoms with AI, locate Phnom Penh garages, and browse the integrated Spare Parts Classifieds & Barter Exchange Marketplace. MyCar Care KH — App Product Document

Latest Working Version: V6.1.0 — Marketplace + Vehicle Care Ecosystem
Prepared for: MyCar Care KH App Development / Investor Pitch / Developer Handoff
